title: Trigger
description: A Trigger is an event that initiates a Capability — either from a user, an external system, or the passage of time. Triggers are the entry point to all behavior.

capability.description: The Capability this trigger initiates, expressed as Noun.Verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what initiates this trigger.

schedule.description: A cron expression defining when the trigger fires. Required when source is 'schedule'.

event.description: The webhook event name that fires this trigger. Required when source is 'webhook'.

after.description: The Capability whose completion fires this trigger. Required when source is 'capability'.

condition.description: An optional condition that must be true at trigger time for the capability to be initiated.
